WITH monthly_sales_with_product AS (
    SELECT 
        ms.product_id,
        p.name AS product_name,
        ms.mth,
        ms.qty
    FROM monthly_sales ms
    JOIN products p ON ms.product_id = p.id
),
sales_2017 AS (
    SELECT 
        product_id,
        product_name,
        mth,
        qty
    FROM monthly_sales_with_product
    WHERE mth >= '2017-01-01' AND mth <= '2017-12-01'
),
avg_12_month AS (
    SELECT 
        product_id,
        mth,

WITH monthly_sales_with_product AS (
    SELECT 
        ms.product_id,
        p.name AS product_name,
        ms.mth,
        ms.qty
    FROM monthly_sales ms
    JOIN products p ON ms.product_id = p.id
),
centered_moving_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        product_id,
        mth,
        AVG(qty) OVER (
            PARTITION BY product_id 
            ORDER BY mth 
            ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND 6 FOLLOWING
        ) AS cma
    FROM monthly_sales_with_product
),
